Localization.Description: Processing emails by the KATA module

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Kaspersky Secure Mail Gateway queued an email from {subject.account.contact} on host {src.host} to {object.account.contact} in KATA Quarantine on host {event_src.host}
Kaspersky Secure Mail Gateway moved an email from {subject.account.contact} on host {src.host} to {object.account.contact} to KATA Quarantine on host {event_src.host}
Kaspersky Secure Mail Gateway rejected an email from {subject.account.contact} on host {src.host} to {object.account.contact} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
Kaspersky Secure Mail Gateway cleared dangerous attachments in an email from {subject.account.contact} on host {src.host} to {object.account.contact} on host {event_src.host}
Kaspersky Secure Mail Gateway deleted attachments in an email from {subject.account.contact} on host {src.host} to {object.account.contact} on host {event_src.host}
